# Support

## Before opening an issue

- **Search existing issues** — your problem may already be reported or fixed.
- **Check Discussions** — questions and general help live at [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/BenJule/BambuStudio/discussions).

## Where to get help

| Topic | Where |
|-------|-------|
| Bug in this fork | [Open an Issue](https://github.com/BenJule/BambuStudio/issues/new/choose) |
| General questions / how-to | [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/BenJule/BambuStudio/discussions) |
| Security vulnerability | [Private advisory](https://github.com/BenJule/BambuStudio/security/advisories/new) |
| Hardware / firmware / Bambu cloud | [Bambu Lab Support](https://bambulab.com/en/support) |
| Upstream BambuStudio bug | [bambulab/BambuStudio](https://github.com/bambulab/BambuStudio/issues) |

## Log file locations

Attach logs when reporting bugs — they are essential for diagnosis.

| OS | Path |
|----|------|
| Windows | `%APPDATA%\BambuStudio\log` |
| macOS | `~/Library/Application Support/BambuStudio/log` |
| Linux | `~/.config/BambuStudio/log` |

Or: **Help → Show Configuration Folder** inside the app.

## This is a community fork

This repository is an **unofficial downstream fork** of [bambulab/BambuStudio](https://github.com/bambulab/BambuStudio).
Bambu Lab does not provide support for builds from this fork.
